milestones.notes: Verification layer now consumes standard AIP v1alpha3 logs.
Non-invasive Python tool for log analysis is ready.
Waiting to validate against James's testing scenarios.

collaboration_roadmap.focus_area: Providing structured audit visibility for AIP implementations.
next_steps: Refine the logic bridge for complex multi-tool scenarios.
Demonstrate verifiable judgments in gaslight attack simulations.
Contribute audit best practices to the Agent2Agent Working Group.

community_alignment.forum: IETF Standards Working Group / GitHub Discussion #14
community_alignment.vision: A seamless, high-integrity verification layer for the AIP ecosystem.

future_outlook.for_integrators: AIP v1alpha3 provides the identity foundation; this layer adds pluggable verification logic.
future_outlook.long_term: Continuous adaptation to support future AIP evolutions and cryptographic auditing.
